'''鈭歜-th-dh''' ('''kabathadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quintessentialise|quintessentialise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-th-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quintessentialise|quintessentialise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-th-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kabathadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibathadh|thibathadh]] || [[word:jibathadh|jibathadh]] || [[word:shibathadh|shibathadh]] || [[word:kibathadh|kibathadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubathadh|thuthubathadh]] || [[word:jujubathadh|jujubathadh]] || [[word:shushubathadh|shushubathadh]] || [[word:kukubathadh|kukubathadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubathadh|thubathadh]] || [[word:jubathadh|jubathadh]] || [[word:shubathadh|shubathadh]] || [[word:kubathadh|kubathadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubathadh|thubathadh]] || [[word:jubathadh|jubathadh]] || [[word:shubathadh|shubathadh]] || [[word:kubathadh|kubathadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebathadh|thebathadh]] || [[word:jebathadh|jebathadh]] || [[word:shebathadh|shebathadh]] || [[word:kebathadh|kebathadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobathadh|thothobathadh]] || [[word:jojobathadh|jojobathadh]] || [[word:shoshobathadh|shoshobathadh]] || [[word:kokobathadh|kokobathadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobathadh|thobathadh]] || [[word:jobathadh|jobathadh]] || [[word:shobathadh|shobathadh]] || [[word:kobathadh|kobathadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobathadh|thobathadh]] || [[word:jobathadh|jobathadh]] || [[word:shobathadh|shobathadh]] || [[word:kobathadh|kobathadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bathadh|bathadh]] || [[word:bathadh|bathadh]] || [[word:bathadh|bathadh]] || [[word:bathadh|bathadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bathadh|bathadh]] || [[word:bathadh|bathadh]] || [[word:bathadh|bathadh]] || [[word:bathadh|bathadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bathadh|bathadh]] || [[word:bathadh|bathadh]] || [[word:bathadh|bathadh]] || [[word:bathadh|bathadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bathadh|bathadh]] || [[word:bathadh|bathadh]] || [[word:bathadh|bathadh]] || [[word:bathadh|bathadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bathadh|th忙bathadh]] || [[word:j忙bathadh|j忙bathadh]] || [[word:sh忙bathadh|sh忙bathadh]] || [[word:k忙bathadh|k忙bathadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabathadh|thathabathadh]] || [[word:jajabathadh|jajabathadh]] || [[word:shashabathadh|shashabathadh]] || [[word:kakabathadh|kakabathadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabathadh|thabathadh]] || [[word:jabathadh|jabathadh]] || [[word:shabathadh|shabathadh]] || [[word:kabathadh|kabathadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabathadh|thabathadh]] || [[word:jabathadh|jabathadh]] || [[word:shabathadh|shabathadh]] || [[word:kabathadh|kabathadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabathadh|shabathadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabathadh|goshabathadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabathadh|gokishabathadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabathadhn眉|shabathadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabathadhnkn眉|goshabathadhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabathadhn眉|gokishabathadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabathadhsh毛|shabathadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabathadhnksh毛|goshabathadhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabathadhsh毛|gokishabathadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabathadhro|shabathadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabathadhnkro|goshabathadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabathadhro|gokishabathadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabathadhmu|shabathadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabathadhnkmu|goshabathadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabathadhmu|gokishabathadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabathadhsher|shabathadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabathadhnksher|goshabathadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabathadhsher|gokishabathadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabathadhng|shabathadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabathadhnkng|goshabathadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabathadhng|gokishabathadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabathadhya|shabathadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabathadhnkya|goshabathadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabathadhya|gokishabathadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabathadhyam|shabathadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabathadhnkyam|goshabathadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabathadhyam|gokishabathadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabathadhn眉sh毛|shabathadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabathadhnkn眉sh毛|goshabathadhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabathadhn眉sh毛|gokishabathadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabathadhn眉ro|shabathadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabathadhnkn眉ro|goshabathadhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabathadhn眉ro|gokishabathadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabathadhn眉mu|shabathadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabathadhnkn眉mu|goshabathadhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabathadhn眉mu|gokishabathadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabathadhsh毛n眉|shabathadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabathadhnksh毛n眉|goshabathadhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabathadhsh毛n眉|gokishabathadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabathadhsh毛ro|shabathadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabathadhnksh毛ro|goshabathadhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabathadhsh毛ro|gokishabathadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabathadhsh毛mu|shabathadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabathadhnksh毛mu|goshabathadhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabathadhsh毛mu|gokishabathadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabathadhron眉|shabathadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabathadhnkron眉|goshabathadhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabathadhron眉|gokishabathadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabathadhrosh毛|shabathadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabathadhnkrosh毛|goshabathadhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabathadhrosh毛|gokishabathadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabathadhromu|shabathadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabathadhnkromu|goshabathadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabathadhromu|gokishabathadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabathadhmun眉|shabathadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabathadhnkmun眉|goshabathadhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabathadhmun眉|gokishabathadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabathadhmush毛|shabathadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabathadhnkmush毛|goshabathadhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabathadhmush毛|gokishabathadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabathadhmuro|shabathadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabathadhnkmuro|goshabathadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabathadhmuro|gokishabathadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
